scene: A movie theater snack counter. A worker doodle stick figure wearing a little paper cap and vest happily hands a big tub of popcorn across the counter to another stick figure, both smiling. Flat warm red cinema background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A relaxed, oblivious doodle stick figure holding the big popcorn tub, casually waving with a friendly speech bubble containing a little smiley face. Flat warm orange background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A doodle stick figure frozen mid-step with huge wide eyes and a hand clapped over its mouth, sweat pouring down, while the counter worker behind gives a blank confused stare with a question mark. Flat pale yellow background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A doodle stick figure lying in bed at night under a blanket, eyes wide open and haunted, a small clock on the wall showing very late, a tiny replay thought bubble above. Flat dark navy night background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A cutaway of a doodle stick figure's round head showing a tiny robot inside reading lines off a teleprompter script scroll, little gears turning, working on autopilot. Flat teal background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
